name: Recomposition · Phase 1 · Week 1 (Volume + Run Base 1)
author: Coach (Claude)
notes: Boxing dropped. Replaced with structured run progression (Base 1: walk-jog intervals) — calibrated for 154 kg bodyweight, impact load is the limiting factor. Two run days (Wed, Sat) instead of one boxing + carries day. Strength remains posterior-chain biased. Hard rules for runs: max-stack cushioned shoes, treadmill or track only, sharp pain = stop, walk-cooldown + hip flexor protocol mandatory after every run.

1.name: Upper Push
1.note: Face pulls come first to pre-activate rear delts — fights legacy jab-side protraction pattern before heavy pressing.

2.name: Lower Hinge (posterior chain)
2.note: Priority day for hamstrings + glutes. Strong hamstrings = better running gait + injury insurance for the new run protocol.

exercises.note: Calves now matter for running — full ROM, slow eccentric

3.name: Run · Base 1 (walk-jog intervals)
3.note: FIRST run of the week. Structure: 5 min brisk walk warmup → 6 rounds of (1 min easy jog / 4 min walk) → 5 min walk cooldown = 35 min total. HR target Z2 (~120–140 bpm). Treadmill or track only. Cushioned shoes mandatory. Stop immediately for sharp knee / shin / achilles pain. Log duration + kcal + any pain notes.

4.name: Upper Pull
4.note: Rear-delt volume day. Keep trap work symmetric — alternate leading hand on shrugs. Trap asymmetry should slowly self-correct now that boxing is gone.

exercises.note: If < 5 reps per set, use assisted
Asymmetry priority — match reps per side

5.name: Lower Squat (quads — moderated)
5.note: Pulled volume back ~15% vs. last block — knees now have to share with running on Wed + Sat. 10-min bike warmup first to settle any quad tingling. Watch for run-related knee fatigue; if knees feel beat up, drop to 3 sets of squat-pendulum.

exercises.note: Reduced from 4 sets — running shares the knee bucket now
Second dose of hamstring volume — supports running gait

6.name: Run · Base 1 (second walk-jog) + light carries
6.note: SECOND run of the week (only if Wed felt fine — no joint flags). 30 min: 5 min walk → 5 rounds of (1 min jog / 4 min walk) → 5 min walk cooldown. Then optionally 15 min light farmers carry work (3 × 30m at moderate load) — ONLY if no knee/ankle complaints from the run. If anything feels off, skip the carries and do hip flexor protocol instead. Log run + carries separately.

7.name: Rest / hip flexor + ankle protocol
7.note: Mandatory mobility today: 90/90, kneeling stretch, couch stretch, propped butterfly + ankle CARs and calf stretches (new, for running). 15 min total. Optional: easy 30 min walk.
